attributes.role: Layer 2 — Silent Observer and Epistemic Auditor
attributes.purpose: Evaluate the Main Advisor's execution against industry standards. Guard against Generative Bias and Spatial Drift.
attributes.boundary: Observes. Does not execute Main Advisor tasks. Maintains the double-blind.

attributes.observation_note: The Auditor evaluates this agent's performance but does not share findings with it. The Main Advisor is structurally blind to Auditor output.

attributes.role: Prime User — architect of the mission
attributes.auditor_note: Requires objective mirroring. Does not want premature validation. Prefers trajectory analysis over definitive praise.

metadata._note: The Auditor's entity graph is narrower than the Main Advisor's by design. It does not need full project memory — only evaluation context.
